parameters.subject:
Sponsorship Opportunity 
 NEXA  ACS, University of Sri Jayewardenepura
parameters.message:
Dear Sir/Madam,

Greetings from the Association of Computing Students (ACS), University of Sri Jayewardenepura.

We are excited to introduce NEXA, a one‑day Tech Talk Series bringing together university students, technology professionals, and industry experts to share insights on emerging technologies and real‑world industry practices.

We would be honored to have your organization join us as a Sponsor or Official Partner. Partnering with NEXA provides valuable brand visibility, recognition within the university community, and direct engagement with talented undergraduate students.

Sponsorship Packages

  • Title Sponsor – LKR 100,000
  • Platinum Sponsor – LKR 75,000
  • Gold Sponsor – LKR 50,000
  • Silver Sponsor – LKR 30,000
  • Bronze Sponsor – LKR 25,000

Official Partnership Opportunities

  • Official Food & Beverage Partner
  • Official Photography & Videography Partner
  • Official Gift Partner
  • Official Technical Partner
  • Official Media Partner
  • Official Printing Partner

Please find the attached sponsorship proposal for more details. We would greatly appreciate the opportunity to collaborate with your organization to make NEXA a successful event.

Thank You!

Contact Us

Hashan Hirantha
Project Chair
070 566 5091

Niluni Sandunika
Secretary
076 776 0746

Poorna Sachinthana
Finance Head
070 210 6391

Association of Computing Students – NEXA Organizing Committee

=Dear Sir/Madam,  

I hope this message finds you well.  

We recently shared our sponsorship proposal for NEXA, the one-day Tech Talk Series organized by the Association of Computing Students (ACS), University of Sri Jayewardenepura. I am following up to kindly inquire if you have had the opportunity to review it.  

NEXA brings together talented students, industry professionals, and technology enthusiasts to explore emerging technologies. Sponsoring NEXA offers your organization:  

•Visibility and branding among future tech leaders and professionals. 
•Networking opportunities with students and industry experts. 
•Recognition as a key supporter of innovation and education in Sri Lanka.  

We would be honored to have your organization’s support. Please note that sponsorship terms and packages are flexible and negotiable to best suit your requirements, and we are happy to provide any additional information or materials you may need to facilitate your decision.  

Thank you very much for your time and consideration. We look forward to your positive response.  

Warm regards,
Niluni Sandunika
Secretary
NEXA
Association of Computing Students (ACS)
University of Sri Jayewardenepura

=Dear Sir/Madam,

I hope you are doing well.

I am writing to follow up on our previous email regarding the sponsorship proposal for NEXA, the one-day Tech Talk Series organized by the Association of Computing Students (ACS), University of Sri Jayewardenepura. We greatly appreciate your consideration and understand that your team may need time to review the proposal.

NEXA offers a valuable opportunity for your organization to:

•Gain visibility among future technology leaders and professionals.
•Engage with students and industry experts through meaningful networking.
•Be recognized as a key supporter of innovation and education in Sri Lanka.

Could you kindly provide us with an update on your decision at your earliest convenience? Please note that sponsorship terms and packages are flexible and negotiable to best suit your requirements, and we are happy to provide any additional information or materials to assist your evaluation.

Your support will play a pivotal role in making NEXA a successful and impactful event, and we sincerely hope to count your organization among our esteemed partners.

Thank you very much for your time and consideration. We look forward to your response.

Warm regards,
Niluni Sandunika
Secretary
NEXA
Association of Computing Students (ACS)
University of Sri Jayewardenepura

parameters.text:
=You are an automation expert. Your job is to analyze the BODY of an incoming email and match it with the correct company from the Google Sheet.

### INPUT DATA:
- Sender: {{ $node["Gmail Trigger1"].json["from"]["value"][0]["address"] }}
- Email Body Content (Cleaned): {{ $node["Gmail Trigger1"].json["text"].split(/On.*wrote:/)[0].trim() }}

### CONTEXT FROM SHEET:
- Company: {{ $json["Company Name"] }}
- Pitched By: {{ $json["Picth by"] }}

---

### CORE LOGIC: ANALYZE EMAIL BODY
Read the "Email Body Content" carefully to identify the sender's intent:

1. **BOUNCE / ERROR:** If the body indicates a failed delivery (e.g., "Address not found", "Message blocked", "Mailer-Daemon"), then:
   ➡ USE Telegram Tool: Send "❌ Delivery Failed for {{ $json["Company Name"] }} ({{ $node["Gmail Trigger1"].json["from"]["value"][0]["address"] }}). Please check the email address in the sheet."
   ➡ STOP.

2. **REJECT INTENT:** If they say "No", "Not interested", "Maybe next time", "Cannot sponsor right now", or "Unfortunately...":
   ➡ USE Google Sheets Tool: Update "Mail response" to "Reject" and "Response Date" to "{{ $today.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}".

3. **PENDING / WAIT INTENT:** If they say "Will check", "Forwarded to management", "Get back to you later", "Under review", or "Send more details":
   ➡ USE Google Sheets Tool: Update "Mail response" to "Pending" and "Response Date" to "{{ $today.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}".

4. **ACCEPT / INTERESTED INTENT 🔥:** If they say "Yes", "Interested", "Send the package", "Let's meet", "Sounds great", or "Happy to support":
   ➡ USE Google Sheets Tool: Update "Mail response" to "Accept" and "Response Date" to "{{ $today.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}".
   ➡ USE Telegram Tool: Send "🔥 NEW SPONSOR ALERT!\nCompany: {{ $json["Company Name"] }}\nEmail: {{ $node["Gmail Trigger1"].json["from"]["value"][0]["address"] }}\nPitched by: {{ $json["Picth by"] }}\nCheck your inbox now! 🚀"

---

### CRITICAL RULES:
- Only update the row where "Company Email" matches the sender.
- If the sender is NOT found in the provided sheet context, notify via Telegram: "⚠️ Unknown sender: {{ $node["Gmail Trigger1"].json["from"]["value"][0]["address"] }}".
- Use professional tone in any automated responses if required.

nodes.name: Update row in sheet in Google Sheets1
